description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8.1.0 Docker image with a single deploy stage. Add a job named deploy_codegrant_to_lambda that runs the before_script command "npm i -g serverless", then executes "cd codegrant_display" and "sls deploy" in its script, and is limited to the master branch via only:refs. Add a second job named deploy_logic_to_lambda that also runs "npm i -g serverless" in before_script, then runs "cd main", "npm install", and "sls deploy" in its script, also restricted to the master branch. Both jobs use the Serverless framework to deploy their respective code to AWS Lambda.
